definition: stable, compressible, causal, reconstructible relational geometry over hidden states

evaluation_contract.claim_boundary: this evaluation can support an ERGT intelligence-space claim; it does not prove consciousness or general intelligence
evaluation_contract.control_rule: random, shuffled, no-memory, pairwise, and matched-parameter controls must not explain the same gains
evaluation_contract.positive_evidence: real relational structures self-organize, stay reconstructible, improve reasoning-specific tasks, and survive controls
evaluation_contract.replication_rule: effects must replicate across seeds and datasets

operational_intelligence_definition: discovery + compression + stabilization + traversal of relational structures
